div.p: Format: $len CRLF data CRLF Example: $5 CRLF hello CRLF Null: $-1 CRLF
Format: *count CRLF ...elements... Example: *2 CRLF $3 CRLF SET CRLF $5 CRLF mykey CRLF Null: *-1 CRLF Empty: *0 CRLF

g.text: SET k v *3 $3 SET $1 k $1 v

ul.li: Use single-quoted strings for labels with special chars
Single quotes are literal - avoid substitution issues
Check for CRLF terminator in simple/bulk strings
Track remaining bytes for bulk strings
